name: concurrent-cl-gate rejects a candidate that overlaps an active CL on workflow-state subsections per §2.23 (b) disjoint clause
command: mkdir -p sessions && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"s1","phases":["E"],"state_subsections":["commits"],"branch":"feat/x"}' > sessions/s1.json && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"s2","phases":["F"],"state_subsections":["commits"],"branch":"feat/y"}' > cand.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/concurrent-cl-gate.sh" --sessions-dir sessions --candidate cand.json --allow-concurrent 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'reject reason=overlap_b' out.txt && grep -q 'state_subsection=commits' out.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
